name: nutrient-pdf-editor-mcp
description: View, annotate, fill forms, and redact PDFs directly from Claude.
long_description: Highlight, fill forms, redact, and review PDFs directly from Claude. The Nutrient Web Viewer renders inside your conversation so you and Claude share the same view — and every edit saves straight back to the file on your machine, without leaving the chat.

tools.name: open_document
tools.description: Open a PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/PNG/JPG/TIFF in the embedded viewer.

tools.name: close_document
tools.description: Tear down the SDK and clear session state.

tools.name: get_view_state
tools.description: Return current page, page count, and document path.

tools.name: set_view_state
tools.description: Navigate, scroll, or select within the open document.

tools.name: search_exact_text
tools.description: Exact-text search with optional page scope.

tools.name: read_document_information
tools.description: Read page count, title, and permissions.

tools.name: read_page_info
tools.description: Read width, height, and rotation for a page.

tools.name: get_page_image
tools.description: Render a page as a PNG image content block plus dimension metadata.

tools.name: read_text
tools.description: Read plain text, with optional 0-based page range.

tools.name: read_annotations
tools.description: Read annotations, filterable by page and type.

tools.name: apply_annotations
tools.description: Apply queued redactions (gated by chat confirmation).

tools.name: read_form_fields
tools.description: Read form field values with optional page scope.

tools.name: update_form_field_values
tools.description: Fill text, checkbox, radio, combobox, or listbox fields.
